---
title: "高階定数係数斉次線形微分方程式"
---

次の各小問において, 微分方程式の解をすべて求めよ. ただし, $D=\tfrac{d}{dx}$ とし, $C_k$ $(k=1,2,\dots)$ を任意定数として用いて良い.

## (1) 実根のみ

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="real-distinct-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generateRealDistinct()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="real-distinct-answer"></div>

- 特性根が異なる実根だけの場合，各実根 $a$ に対して $e^{ax}$ が出る。
- 一般解はそれらの線形結合。

</details>
</div>

## (2) 虚根のみ

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="complex-distinct-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generateComplexDistinct()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="complex-distinct-answer"></div>

- 因子 $((D-a)^2+b^2)$ は特性根 $a \pm bi$ に対応する。
- 実数値解として $e^{ax}\cos bx$ と $e^{ax}\sin bx$ が出る。
- 一般解は各因子から出る解の線形結合。

</details>
</div>

## (3) 実根が多重度 $m$

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="real-repeated-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generateRealRepeated()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="real-repeated-answer"></div>

- $(D-a)^m$ は実根 $a$ が多重度 $m$ であることを表す。
- $e^{ax}, xe^{ax}, \ldots, x^{m-1}e^{ax}$ が出る。
- 解答は $e^{ax}$ に次数 $m-1$ 以下の多項式をかけた形でまとめてよい。

</details>
</div>

## (4) 虚根が多重度 $m$

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="complex-repeated-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generateComplexRepeated()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="complex-repeated-answer"></div>

- $((D-a)^2+b^2)^m$ は虚根 $a \pm bi$ が多重度 $m$ であることを表す。
- 解答は $e^{ax}\{P(x)\cos bx + Q(x)\sin bx\}$ の形でまとめてよい。
- $P(x), Q(x)$ は次数 $m-1$ 以下の多項式。

</details>
</div>

## (5) 一般の場合

<div class="practice-box">
<div id="mixed-repeated-problem"></div>
<div class="problem-button-row">
  <button type="button" class="problem-button" onclick="generateMixedRepeated()">問題を変更</button>
</div>
<details>
<summary>解答と解説</summary>

<div id="mixed-repeated-answer"></div>

- 実根部分と虚根部分をそれぞれ処理し，それらを足し合わせる。
- 実根の重根から出る項と，虚根の重根から出る項を分けて書く。

</details>
</div>

<script>
function randInt(min, max) {
  return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
}

function sampleWithoutReplacement(array, k) {
  const arr = array.slice();
  const out = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < k; i++) {
    const j = randInt(0, arr.length - 1);
    out.push(arr.splice(j, 1)[0]);
  }
  return out;
}

function range(min, max) {
  const out = [];
  for (let i = min; i <= max; i++) out.push(i);
  return out;
}

function plusSigned(n) {
  if (n > 0) return "+" + n;
  if (n < 0) return String(n);
  return "";
}

function minusRootFactor(a) {
  if (a === 0) return "D";
  if (a > 0) return "D-" + a;
  return "D+" + Math.abs(a);
}

function expFactor(a) {
  if (a === 0) return "";
  if (a === 1) return "e^{x}";
  if (a === -1) return "e^{-x}";
  return `e^{${a}x}`;
}

function trigArg(b, fn) {
  if (b === 1) return `\\${fn} x`;
  return `\\${fn} ${b}x`;
}

function tPower(p) {
  if (p === 0) return "";
  if (p === 1) return "x";
  return `x^${p}`;
}

function constantTerm(index, power) {
  const tp = tPower(power);
  if (power === 0) return `C_{${index}}`;
  return `C_{${index}}${tp}`;
}

function polynomial(startIndex, degree) {
  const terms = [];
  for (let p = 0; p <= degree; p++) {
    terms.push(constantTerm(startIndex + p, p));
  }
  return terms.join("+");
}

function realDistinctEquation(roots) {
  return roots.map(a => `(${minusRootFactor(a)})`).join("") + "y=0";
}

function complexFactor(pair) {
  const a = pair[0];
  const b = pair[1];
  if (a === 0) return `(D^2+${b*b})`;
  return `((${minusRootFactor(a)})^2+${b*b})`;
}

function complexDistinctEquation(pairs) {
  return pairs.map(pair => complexFactor(pair)).join("") + "y=0";
}

function realDistinctAnswer(roots) {
  const terms = roots.map((a, i) => {
    const c = `C_{${i + 1}}`;
    const e = expFactor(a);
    return e === "" ? c : `${c}${e}`;
  });
  return "y=" + terms.join("+");
}

function complexDistinctAnswer(pairs) {
  let c = 1;
  const terms = [];
  pairs.forEach(pair => {
    const a = pair[0];
    const b = pair[1];
    const e = expFactor(a);
    const body = `C_{${c}}${trigArg(b, "cos")}+C_{${c+1}}${trigArg(b, "sin")}`;
    c += 2;
    terms.push(e === "" ? `(${body})` : `${e}(${body})`);
  });
  return "y=" + terms.join("+");
}

function realRepeatedAnswer(a, m) {
  const e = expFactor(a);
  const poly = polynomial(1, m - 1);
  return e === "" ? `y=${poly}` : `y=${e}(${poly})`;
}

function complexRepeatedAnswer(pair, m) {
  const a = pair[0];
  const b = pair[1];
  const e = expFactor(a);
  const p = polynomial(1, m - 1);
  const q = polynomial(m + 1, m - 1);
  const body = `(${p})${trigArg(b, "cos")}+(${q})${trigArg(b, "sin")}`;
  return e === "" ? `y=${body}` : `y=${e}\\left\\{${body}\\right\\}`;
}

function mixedRepeatedAnswer(a, r, pair) {
  const c = pair[0];
  const d = pair[1];
  const e1 = expFactor(a);
  const realPoly = polynomial(1, r - 1);
  const realPart = e1 === "" ? realPoly : `${e1}(${realPoly})`;
  const start = r + 1;
  const p = polynomial(start, 1);
  const q = polynomial(start + 2, 1);
  const e2 = expFactor(c);
  const complexBody = `(${p})${trigArg(d, "cos")}+(${q})${trigArg(d, "sin")}`;
  const complexPart = e2 === "" ? complexBody : `${e2}\\left\\{${complexBody}\\right\\}`;
  return `y=${realPart}+${complexPart}`;
}

function setMath(id, tex) {
  const element = document.getElementById(id);
  element.innerHTML = "";

  if (window.MathJax && window.MathJax.typesetPromise) {
    element.innerHTML = `\\[${tex}\\]`;
    window.MathJax.typesetPromise([element]);
  } else if (window.katex) {
    window.katex.render(tex, element, {
      displayMode: true,
      throwOnError: false
    });
  } else {
    element.textContent = tex;
  }
}

function typeset() {
  // setMath の中で数式レンダリングするため、この関数は空でよい。
}

function generateRealDistinct() {
  const k = randInt(3, 5);
  const roots = sampleWithoutReplacement(range(-9, 9), k).sort((a,b) => a-b);
  setMath("real-distinct-problem", realDistinctEquation(roots));
  setMath("real-distinct-answer", realDistinctAnswer(roots));
  typeset();
}

function generateComplexDistinct() {
  const allPairs = [];
  for (const a of range(-9, 9)) {
    for (const b of range(1, 9)) {
      allPairs.push([a, b]);
    }
  }
  const k = randInt(2, 3);
  const pairs = sampleWithoutReplacement(allPairs, k);
  setMath("complex-distinct-problem", complexDistinctEquation(pairs));
  setMath("complex-distinct-answer", complexDistinctAnswer(pairs));
  typeset();
}

function generateRealRepeated() {
  const a = randInt(-9, 9);
  const m = randInt(3, 6);
  setMath("real-repeated-problem", `(${minusRootFactor(a)})^${m}y=0`);
  setMath("real-repeated-answer", realRepeatedAnswer(a, m));
  typeset();
}

function generateComplexRepeated() {
  const a = randInt(-9, 9);
  const b = randInt(1, 9);
  const m = randInt(2, 4);
  const pair = [a, b];
  setMath("complex-repeated-problem", `${complexFactor(pair)}^${m}y=0`);
  setMath("complex-repeated-answer", complexRepeatedAnswer(pair, m));
  typeset();
}

function generateMixedRepeated() {
  const a = randInt(-9, 9);
  const r = randInt(3, 4);
  const c = randInt(-9, 9);
  const d = randInt(1, 9);
  const pair = [c, d];
  setMath("mixed-repeated-problem", `(${minusRootFactor(a)})^${r}${complexFactor(pair)}^2y=0`);
  setMath("mixed-repeated-answer", mixedRepeatedAnswer(a, r, pair));
  typeset();
}

window.addEventListener("load", function() {
  generateRealDistinct();
  generateComplexDistinct();
  generateRealRepeated();
  generateComplexRepeated();
  generateMixedRepeated();
});
</script>
